deviations.what: the first Tokenizer's tokens are now model-bound (t_tokens): onAddToken appends the input value, onTokenDelete removes by key (the deleted key arrives via $event.getParameter('tokens')[0].getKey()); the second, disabled Tokenizer keeps its 3 static tokens, so the port shows one bound Token template + 3 static Token vs the original's 3+3.
the CheckBox select handler becomes a live two-way selected/editable bind on the first Tokenizer.
